title: Light in the Piazza
actors: Olivia de Havilland, George Hamilton, Yvette Mimieux
plot: Clara Johnson, mentally disabled after childhood injury, meets Fabrizio in Florence. Her mother Meg sees their romance as hope for normalcy, hiding Clara's condition from his family, while father Noel opposes the match.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
